name: To Stabilize Whipped Cream....
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon clear vanilla (or regular if you do not mind that it will not be real white.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine gelatin and cold water in a saucepan.
2. Let stand until thick.
3. Place over low heat, stirring constantly, just until the gelatin dissolves.
4. Remove from heat and cool.
5. Whip cream, sugar, and vanilla until slightly thickened.
6. Gradually add the cooled gelatin to the whipped cream mixture while beating slowly.
7. Whip at high speed until stiff.
8. Cakes iced with whipped cream must be stored in the refrigerator.
